compiled_state.title: [UPDATE] Sync .github/workflows/ci.yml: replace claude-code-action with classifier-driven runner
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Apply the same llm-review job change from Task 4294-9d9f (template) to the live .github/workflows/ci.yml file.

## File Impact
### Files to modify
- .github/workflows/ci.yml

## Change

Replace the llm-review job steps block (lines ~149-230, currently contains validate-vars, select-model, and claude-code-action steps) with:

```yaml
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Run LLM review
        env:
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          # Do NOT set CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT — runner self-resolves _PLUGIN_ROOT from BASH_SOURCE
        run: |
          # DSO_LLM_TIER is deprecated; tier is now selected automatically by the classifier
          gh pr diff | bash plugins/dso/scripts/ci-llm-review-runner.sh
```

Use bare path 'bash plugins/dso/scripts/ci-llm-review-runner.sh' to match established workflow convention.

## Verify
grep -q 'ci-llm-review-runner.sh' .github/workflows/ci.yml && echo 'runner present'
( grep -c 'claude-code-action' .github/workflows/ci.yml | grep -q '^0$' ) && echo 'action removed'

## Done definitions
- ci.yml llm-review job no longer references claude-code-action or DSO_LLM_TIER
- ci.yml and ci-dso-staged.yml template are structurally identical in the llm-review job
